code:
// Translation system for Amharic (am) and English (en)

export const translations = {
  en: {
    // Navigation
    home: 'Home',
    aboutUs: 'About Us',
    services: 'Services',
    contact: 'Contact',
    login: 'Login',
    register: 'Register',
    logout: 'Logout',
    // Home Page
    welcomeTo: 'Welcome to',
    agmasMediumClinic: 'Agmas Medium Clinic',
    homeSubtitle: 'A modern, fully integrated patient management system designed for exceptional healthcare delivery.',
    getStartedToday: 'Get Started Today',
    exploreServices: 'Explore Services',
    // Patient Dashboard
    dashboard: 'Dashboard',
    queue: 'Queue',
    medicalHistory: 'Medical History',
    appointment: 'Appointment',
    portfolio: 'Portfolio',
    welcomeBack: 'Welcome back',
    healthOverview: "Here's your health overview today",
    // Stats
    appointments: 'Appointments',
    upcomingVisits: 'Upcoming visits',
    queuePosition: 'Queue Position',
    currentPosition: 'Current position',
    prescriptions: 'Prescriptions',
    activeMedications: 'Active medications',
    labTests: 'Lab Tests',
    testResults: 'Test results',
    // Quick Actions
    quickActions: 'Quick Actions',
    joinQueue: 'Join Queue',
    joinQueueDesc: 'Get in line to see a doctor',
    viewHistory: 'Medical History',
    viewHistoryDesc: 'View your records',
    myProfile: 'My Profile',
    myProfileDesc: 'Update your information',
    // Health Tips
    healthTip: 'Health Tip of the Day',
    healthTipContent: 'Stay hydrated! Drinking 8 glasses of water daily helps maintain your body\'s fluid balance, improves skin health, and supports overall wellness. Remember to bring your water bottle to your appointments!',
    // Queue
    readyToSeeDoctor: 'Ready to see a doctor?',
    joinQueueNow: 'Join Queue Now',
    joinQueueDesc2: 'Join the queue now and get your queue number',
    notInQueue: 'You are not currently in the queue',
    // Medical History Tabs
    prescriptionsTab: 'Prescriptions',
    labResultsTab: 'Lab Results',
    vitalSignsTab: 'Vital Signs',
    paymentsTab: 'Payments',
    // Profile
    editProfile: 'Edit Profile',
    personalInformation: 'Personal Information',
    contactInformation: 'Contact Information',
    emergencyContact: 'Emergency Contact',
    medicalInformation: 'Medical Information',
    firstName: 'First Name',
    lastName: 'Last Name',
    email: 'Email',
    phone: 'Phone',
    dateOfBirth: 'Date of Birth',
    gender: 'Gender',
    address: 'Address',
    bloodType: 'Blood Type',
    allergies: 'Allergies',
    saveChanges: 'Save Changes',
    cancel: 'Cancel',
    // Payment
    paymentHistory: 'Payment History',
    viewReceipt: 'View Receipt',
    printReceipt: 'Print Receipt',
    amount: 'Amount',
    paymentMethod: 'Payment Method',
    status: 'Status',
    receiptNumber: 'Receipt Number',
    // Common
    loading: 'Loading...',
    noData: 'No data available',
    close: 'Close',
    save: 'Save',
    edit: 'Edit',
    delete: 'Delete',
    confirm: 'Confirm',
    male: 'Male',
    female: 'Female',
    other: 'Other'
  },
  am: {
    // Navigation - አሰሳ
    home: 'መነሻ',
    aboutUs: 'ስለ እኛ',
    services: 'አገልግሎቶች',
    contact: 'ያግኙን',
    login: 'ግባ',
    register: 'ይመዝገቡ',
    logout: 'ውጣ',
    // Home Page - የመነሻ ገጽ
    welcomeTo: 'እንኳን ደህና መጡ ወደ',
    agmasMediumClinic: 'አግማስ መካከለኛ ክሊኒክ',
    homeSubtitle: 'ለልዩ የጤና አገልግሎት አቅርቦት የተነደፈ ዘመናዊ፣ ሙሉ በሙሉ የተዋሃደ የታካሚ አስተዳደር ስርዓት።',
    getStartedToday: 'ዛሬ ይጀምሩ',
    exploreServices: 'አገልግሎቶችን ይመልከቱ',
    // Patient Dashboard - የታካሚ ዳሽቦርድ
    dashboard: 'ዳሽቦርድ',
    queue: 'ወረፋ',
    medicalHistory: 'የሕክምና ታሪክ',
    appointment: 'ቀጠሮ',
    portfolio: 'መገለጫ',
    welcomeBack: 'እንኳን ደህና መጡ',
    healthOverview: 'የዛሬው የጤና አጠቃላይ እይታዎ እዚህ አለ',
    // Stats - ስታቲስቲክስ
    appointments: 'ቀጠሮዎች',
    upcomingVisits: 'መጪ ጉብኝቶች',
    queuePosition: 'የወረፋ ቦታ',
    currentPosition: 'የአሁኑ ቦታ',
    prescriptions: 'የመድሃኒት ማዘዣዎች',
    activeMedications: 'ንቁ መድሃኒቶች',
    labTests: 'የላብራቶሪ ምርመራዎች',
    testResults: 'የምርመራ ውጤቶች',
    // Quick Actions - ፈጣን እርምጃዎች
    quickActions: 'ፈጣን እርምጃዎች',
    joinQueue: 'ወረፋ ይቀላቀሉ',
    joinQueueDesc: 'ዶክተር ለማየት በወረፋ ይቀላቀሉ',
    viewHistory: 'የሕክምና ታሪክ',
    viewHistoryDesc: 'መዝገቦችዎን ይመልከቱ',
    myProfile: 'የእኔ መገለጫ',
    myProfileDesc: 'መረጃዎን ያዘምኑ',
    // Health Tips - የጤና ምክሮች
    healthTip: 'የዛሬው የጤና ምክር',
    healthTipContent: 'በቂ ውሃ ይጠጡ! በቀን 8 ብርጭቆ ውሃ መጠጣት የሰውነትዎን የፈሳሽ ሚዛን ለመጠበቅ፣ የቆዳ ጤናን ለማሻሻል እና አጠቃላይ ደህንነትን ይደግፋል። ወደ ቀጠሮዎ የውሃ ጠርሙስዎን ማምጣትዎን አይርሱ!',
    // Queue - ወረፋ
    readyToSeeDoctor: 'ዶክተር ለማየት ዝግጁ ነዎት?',
    joinQueueNow: 'አሁን ወረፋ ይቀላቀሉ',
    joinQueueDesc2: 'አሁን ወረፋውን ይቀላቀሉ እና የወረፋ ቁጥርዎን ያግኙ',
    notInQueue: 'በአሁኑ ጊዜ በወረፋ ውስጥ አይደሉም',
    // Medical History Tabs - የሕክምና ታሪክ ትሮች
    prescriptionsTab: 'የመድሃኒት ማዘዣዎች',
    labResultsTab: 'የላብራቶሪ ውጤቶች',
    vitalSignsTab: 'ወሳኝ ምልክቶች',
    paymentsTab: 'ክፍያዎች',
    // Profile - መገለጫ
    editProfile: 'መገለጫ አርትዕ',
    personalInformation: 'የግል መረጃ',
    contactInformation: 'የመገኛ መረጃ',
    emergencyContact: 'የአደጋ ጊዜ ግንኙነት',
    medicalInformation: 'የሕክምና መረጃ',
    firstName: 'ስም',
    lastName: 'የአባት ስም',
    email: 'ኢሜይል',
    phone: 'ስልክ',
    dateOfBirth: 'የልደት ቀን',
    gender: 'ጾታ',
    address: 'አድራሻ',
    bloodType: 'የደም ዓይነት',
    allergies: 'አለርጂዎች',
    saveChanges: 'ለውጦችን አስቀምጥ',
    cancel: 'ሰርዝ',
    // Payment - ክፍያ
    paymentHistory: 'የክፍያ ታሪክ',
    viewReceipt: 'ደረሰኝ ይመልከቱ',
    printReceipt: 'ደረሰኝ አትም',
    amount: 'መጠን',
    paymentMethod: 'የክፍያ ዘዴ',
    status: 'ሁኔታ',
    receiptNumber: 'የደረሰኝ ቁጥር',
    // Common - የተለመዱ
    loading: 'በመጫን ላይ...',
    noData: 'ምንም መረጃ የለም',
    close: 'ዝጋ',
    save: 'አስቀምጥ',
    edit: 'አርትዕ',
    delete: 'ሰርዝ',
    confirm: 'አረጋግጥ',
    male: 'ወንድ',
    female: 'ሴት',
    other: 'ሌላ'
  }
};

// Get translation function
export const t = (key, language = 'en') => {
  var _translations$languag;
  return ((_translations$languag = translations[language]) === null || _translations$languag === void 0 ? void 0 : _translations$languag[key]) || translations.en[key] || key;
};

// Get current language from localStorage
export const getCurrentLanguage = () => {
  return localStorage.getItem('language') || 'en';
};

// Set language in localStorage
export const setLanguage = language => {
  localStorage.setItem('language', language);
};

sourcesContent:
// Translation system for Amharic (am) and English (en)

export const translations = {
  en: {
    // Navigation
    home: 'Home',
    aboutUs: 'About Us',
    services: 'Services',
    contact: 'Contact',
    login: 'Login',
    register: 'Register',
    logout: 'Logout',
    
    // Home Page
    welcomeTo: 'Welcome to',
    agmasMediumClinic: 'Agmas Medium Clinic',
    homeSubtitle: 'A modern, fully integrated patient management system designed for exceptional healthcare delivery.',
    getStartedToday: 'Get Started Today',
    exploreServices: 'Explore Services',
    
    // Patient Dashboard
    dashboard: 'Dashboard',
    queue: 'Queue',
    medicalHistory: 'Medical History',
    appointment: 'Appointment',
    portfolio: 'Portfolio',
    welcomeBack: 'Welcome back',
    healthOverview: "Here's your health overview today",
    
    // Stats
    appointments: 'Appointments',
    upcomingVisits: 'Upcoming visits',
    queuePosition: 'Queue Position',
    currentPosition: 'Current position',
    prescriptions: 'Prescriptions',
    activeMedications: 'Active medications',
    labTests: 'Lab Tests',
    testResults: 'Test results',
    
    // Quick Actions
    quickActions: 'Quick Actions',
    joinQueue: 'Join Queue',
    joinQueueDesc: 'Get in line to see a doctor',
    viewHistory: 'Medical History',
    viewHistoryDesc: 'View your records',
    myProfile: 'My Profile',
    myProfileDesc: 'Update your information',
    
    // Health Tips
    healthTip: 'Health Tip of the Day',
    healthTipContent: 'Stay hydrated! Drinking 8 glasses of water daily helps maintain your body\'s fluid balance, improves skin health, and supports overall wellness. Remember to bring your water bottle to your appointments!',
    
    // Queue
    readyToSeeDoctor: 'Ready to see a doctor?',
    joinQueueNow: 'Join Queue Now',
    joinQueueDesc2: 'Join the queue now and get your queue number',
    notInQueue: 'You are not currently in the queue',
    
    // Medical History Tabs
    prescriptionsTab: 'Prescriptions',
    labResultsTab: 'Lab Results',
    vitalSignsTab: 'Vital Signs',
    paymentsTab: 'Payments',
    
    // Profile
    editProfile: 'Edit Profile',
    personalInformation: 'Personal Information',
    contactInformation: 'Contact Information',
    emergencyContact: 'Emergency Contact',
    medicalInformation: 'Medical Information',
    firstName: 'First Name',
    lastName: 'Last Name',
    email: 'Email',
    phone: 'Phone',
    dateOfBirth: 'Date of Birth',
    gender: 'Gender',
    address: 'Address',
    bloodType: 'Blood Type',
    allergies: 'Allergies',
    saveChanges: 'Save Changes',
    cancel: 'Cancel',
    
    // Payment
    paymentHistory: 'Payment History',
    viewReceipt: 'View Receipt',
    printReceipt: 'Print Receipt',
    amount: 'Amount',
    paymentMethod: 'Payment Method',
    status: 'Status',
    receiptNumber: 'Receipt Number',
    
    // Common
    loading: 'Loading...',
    noData: 'No data available',
    close: 'Close',
    save: 'Save',
    edit: 'Edit',
    delete: 'Delete',
    confirm: 'Confirm',
    male: 'Male',
    female: 'Female',
    other: 'Other',
  },
  
  am: {
    // Navigation - አሰሳ
    home: 'መነሻ',
    aboutUs: 'ስለ እኛ',
    services: 'አገልግሎቶች',
    contact: 'ያግኙን',
    login: 'ግባ',
    register: 'ይመዝገቡ',
    logout: 'ውጣ',
    
    // Home Page - የመነሻ ገጽ
    welcomeTo: 'እንኳን ደህና መጡ ወደ',
    agmasMediumClinic: 'አግማስ መካከለኛ ክሊኒክ',
    homeSubtitle: 'ለልዩ የጤና አገልግሎት አቅርቦት የተነደፈ ዘመናዊ፣ ሙሉ በሙሉ የተዋሃደ የታካሚ አስተዳደር ስርዓት።',
    getStartedToday: 'ዛሬ ይጀምሩ',
    exploreServices: 'አገልግሎቶችን ይመልከቱ',
    
    // Patient Dashboard - የታካሚ ዳሽቦርድ
    dashboard: 'ዳሽቦርድ',
    queue: 'ወረፋ',
    medicalHistory: 'የሕክምና ታሪክ',
    appointment: 'ቀጠሮ',
    portfolio: 'መገለጫ',
    welcomeBack: 'እንኳን ደህና መጡ',
    healthOverview: 'የዛሬው የጤና አጠቃላይ እይታዎ እዚህ አለ',
    
    // Stats - ስታቲስቲክስ
    appointments: 'ቀጠሮዎች',
    upcomingVisits: 'መጪ ጉብኝቶች',
    queuePosition: 'የወረፋ ቦታ',
    currentPosition: 'የአሁኑ ቦታ',
    prescriptions: 'የመድሃኒት ማዘዣዎች',
    activeMedications: 'ንቁ መድሃኒቶች',
    labTests: 'የላብራቶሪ ምርመራዎች',
    testResults: 'የምርመራ ውጤቶች',
    
    // Quick Actions - ፈጣን እርምጃዎች
    quickActions: 'ፈጣን እርምጃዎች',
    joinQueue: 'ወረፋ ይቀላቀሉ',
    joinQueueDesc: 'ዶክተር ለማየት በወረፋ ይቀላቀሉ',
    viewHistory: 'የሕክምና ታሪክ',
    viewHistoryDesc: 'መዝገቦችዎን ይመልከቱ',
    myProfile: 'የእኔ መገለጫ',
    myProfileDesc: 'መረጃዎን ያዘምኑ',
    
    // Health Tips - የጤና ምክሮች
    healthTip: 'የዛሬው የጤና ምክር',
    healthTipContent: 'በቂ ውሃ ይጠጡ! በቀን 8 ብርጭቆ ውሃ መጠጣት የሰውነትዎን የፈሳሽ ሚዛን ለመጠበቅ፣ የቆዳ ጤናን ለማሻሻል እና አጠቃላይ ደህንነትን ይደግፋል። ወደ ቀጠሮዎ የውሃ ጠርሙስዎን ማምጣትዎን አይርሱ!',
    
    // Queue - ወረፋ
    readyToSeeDoctor: 'ዶክተር ለማየት ዝግጁ ነዎት?',
    joinQueueNow: 'አሁን ወረፋ ይቀላቀሉ',
    joinQueueDesc2: 'አሁን ወረፋውን ይቀላቀሉ እና የወረፋ ቁጥርዎን ያግኙ',
    notInQueue: 'በአሁኑ ጊዜ በወረፋ ውስጥ አይደሉም',
    
    // Medical History Tabs - የሕክምና ታሪክ ትሮች
    prescriptionsTab: 'የመድሃኒት ማዘዣዎች',
    labResultsTab: 'የላብራቶሪ ውጤቶች',
    vitalSignsTab: 'ወሳኝ ምልክቶች',
    paymentsTab: 'ክፍያዎች',
    
    // Profile - መገለጫ
    editProfile: 'መገለጫ አርትዕ',
    personalInformation: 'የግል መረጃ',
    contactInformation: 'የመገኛ መረጃ',
    emergencyContact: 'የአደጋ ጊዜ ግንኙነት',
    medicalInformation: 'የሕክምና መረጃ',
    firstName: 'ስም',
    lastName: 'የአባት ስም',
    email: 'ኢሜይል',
    phone: 'ስልክ',
    dateOfBirth: 'የልደት ቀን',
    gender: 'ጾታ',
    address: 'አድራሻ',
    bloodType: 'የደም ዓይነት',
    allergies: 'አለርጂዎች',
    saveChanges: 'ለውጦችን አስቀምጥ',
    cancel: 'ሰርዝ',
    
    // Payment - ክፍያ
    paymentHistory: 'የክፍያ ታሪክ',
    viewReceipt: 'ደረሰኝ ይመልከቱ',
    printReceipt: 'ደረሰኝ አትም',
    amount: 'መጠን',
    paymentMethod: 'የክፍያ ዘዴ',
    status: 'ሁኔታ',
    receiptNumber: 'የደረሰኝ ቁጥር',
    
    // Common - የተለመዱ
    loading: 'በመጫን ላይ...',
    noData: 'ምንም መረጃ የለም',
    close: 'ዝጋ',
    save: 'አስቀምጥ',
    edit: 'አርትዕ',
    delete: 'ሰርዝ',
    confirm: 'አረጋግጥ',
    male: 'ወንድ',
    female: 'ሴት',
    other: 'ሌላ',
  }
};

// Get translation function
export const t = (key, language = 'en') => {
  return translations[language]?.[key] || translations.en[key] || key;
};

// Get current language from localStorage
export const getCurrentLanguage = () => {
  return localStorage.getItem('language') || 'en';
};

// Set language in localStorage
export const setLanguage = (language) => {
  localStorage.setItem('language', language);
};
